mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_delegation ( delegator_id, delegator_name, delegate_id, delegate_name, start_time, end_time, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{delegatorId}, #{delegatorName}, #{delegateId}, #{delegateName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_delegation SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
